findings.issue: Placeholder comment 'Initialize manually — Jarvis will maintain after first entry' suggests incomplete setup with no automated enforcement
findings.suggestion: Replace with actual initialization logic or remove if Jarvis handles this automatically
findings.est_impact: Confusion about system responsibilities; potential gap in data consistency

findings.issue: 'Entry Criteria' marked 'TBD — fill in after first 10 trades' is a hard rule without defined conditions; blocks rule validation
findings.suggestion: Define entry criteria now or mark as optional; establish minimum threshold before trading starts
findings.est_impact: Rules cannot be enforced programmatically; trades may execute without meeting stated criteria

findings.issue: Hard rule '-25% hard stop at entry' lacks specificity: is this -25% from entry price, or a maximum loss threshold? No calculation method defined
findings.suggestion: Clarify: 'Stop loss at entry_price × 0.75' or equivalent; define how it integrates with OCO order
findings.est_impact: Ambiguous execution; risk management rule may be applied incorrectly, causing unintended losses

findings.issue: 'No trading during Instacart shifts' is a behavioral rule with no technical enforcement mechanism listed
findings.suggestion: Add implementation detail: calendar check, API toggle, or scheduler lock to block trades during shift hours
findings.est_impact: Rule depends on manual discipline; violations go undetected and unlogged
